2026-03-03PMODepartment of Veterans Affairs ActAppointment of the Deputy Minister of Veterans AffairsAppointment of Nancy Gardiner of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Veterans Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Minister of Veterans Affairs
precis: Appointment of Nancy Gardiner of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Deputy Minister of Veterans Affairs, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
